caption: A man wearing a grey powdered wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing displays. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He sits behind a microphone, with a logo and text reading "THE STUDIO PODCAST" on the left and "GOSS TALK JOY" on the right. In the initial moments, the man looks toward the side and begins to gesture with his hands while speaking. As the scene progresses, he shifts his gaze downward and continues talking, his expression becoming more focused. The background remains static, featuring various framed portraits and a "LEE" branded clothing display, while the man's movement is concentrated in his facial expressions and hand gestures.
